title: NEO 4.0 P4-AUTONOMY C4 external-model audit verdict (one JSONL line)
_home: <RunRoot>/external_verdict_ledger.jsonl - append-only; ONE line per LAUNCHED external call that yielded a parseable, model-pinned verdict; NEVER an AUDIT_RESULT (different $id, different home; the slot seam never reads it; the spawn-ledger correlation keeps the auditor slot closed to it)
_status: DRAFT 4.0-P4-C4 (schema gate pending). Spec 10652365 sec-4 C4 + I9 round binding + sec-0/NB-4: every binding value here is supervisor-stamped TAMPER-EVIDENT (not tamper-proof) and rides in END evidence. A verdict record exists ONLY for a LAUNCHED call, so BOTH sequence fields are unconditionally required (dispatch R9-F4). The <=3/HIGH-slice sub-cap on slice_call_seq is enforced at USE time by the derivation (module constant, DEF-P7) - 'maximum' is outside the installed validator's fail-closed keyword set (run_manifest precedent). model_id records the CLI-REPORTED banner id; the gpt-5.5 pin is the MODULE constant, enforced check==use at call time AND use time (single pin authority, never a second schema authority). record_sha256 = body hash excluding record_sha256 itself (tamper-EVIDENT stamp; re-derived at use time).
